name: MONOPOLY GO!
methodology: Open web HTML fetch from the preselected low-login-risk sources. For each source, extract event-related headings, paragraphs, links, and image URLs; follow a small number of event-like links for detail pages.

sources.meta_description: Special events happen throughout the day in Monopoly GO! and can help boost your progress by giving you rewards such as dice, stickers, and more.

event_detail_pages.page_title: Monopoly GO! Free Dice Links Today - Updated May 11, 2026
relevant_text_blocks: Monopoly GO! Free Dice Links Today
Looking for Monopoly GO! free dice links today ? Reward links are official gift links that give players free dice rolls, event currency, sticker packs, and other limited-time bonuses.

Tap a link on your mobile device and the Monopoly GO! app will open automatically to claim the reward. Each link can only be claimed once per account, so if you see a message saying the reward was already claimed, you’ve already used that specific link.
Monopoly GO Reward Link FAQ
Reward links open the Monopoly GO app and add the reward directly to your account when the link is still active and has not already been claimed.
Each reward link can only be claimed once per account. If you see this message, you already claimed that specific link.
New links can appear daily, during special events, or around major game updates. Check back often for the latest links.
Yes. While most links include free dice rolls, some may include event currency, sticker packs, or other limited-time rewards.
Next Golden Blitz: Hightail It! and Feeling Snoozy

The next Golden Blitz has been revealed! View the details below! If you haven't yet experienced a Golden Blitz, now's your chance to get in on the action. This special event allows players to trade two specific golden stickers- usually non-tradable- up to five times each
Roll Treasures: Coming May 12th

Roll Treasures 20 hours May 12, 2026 at 04:00 PM - May 13, 2026 at 12:59 PM Treasure Hunt events in Monopoly GO! challenge players to dig for hidden treasures across multiple levels. Each level presents a grid where you'll use Pickaxes (earned through regular gameplay)

event_detail_pages.meta_description: Partner events are designed for players who have advanced to Board 5 and offer an opportunity to collaborate with friends. The goal? To build attractions on your board and win an array of prizes. Participants contribute to a communal progress bar by spinning a wheel with Event tokens—think macarons for a Baking Event—which are earned through gameplay and active participation in the event.
relevant_text_blocks: Partner events are designed for players who have advanced to Board 5 and offer an opportunity to collaborate with friends. The goal? To build attractions on your board and win an array of prizes. Participants contribute to a communal progress bar by spinning a wheel with Event tokens—think macarons for a Baking Event—which are earned through gameplay and active participation in the event.
Villainous Partners: Coming May 2nd
